hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */pixi.lock|pixi.lock) printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"pixi.lock is generated, not hand-edited. Change the dependency in pyproject.toml and run `pixi install` (or `pixi update <pkg>`) to re-solve the lock."}}';; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.py) RUFF="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.pixi/envs/lint/bin/ruff"; [ -x "$RUFF" ] || RUFF=ruff; "$RUFF" format "$f" && "$RUFF" check --fix "$f";; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
